aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with structured content and schema markup but lacks significant optimizations and user engagement signals.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build a presence on Google and other platforms.
Optimize website content with targeted local HVAC keywords and phrases.
Enhance the website's mobile responsiveness and page load speed.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and engagement.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not actively managed, with no reviews and minimal information. This significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of regular posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) across major directories but lacks citations on niche and local platforms.
action_items: Audit and ensure NAP consistency across all major and local directories.
Increase the number of citations on niche HVAC and local business directories.
Claim and update profiles on platforms like Yelp, Angi, and HomeAdvisor.

schema_gaps: Service schema for specific HVAC services offered.
Review schema to highlight customer testimonials.
FAQ schema to address common customer questions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer engagement and user-generated content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC services with high purchase intent.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing GBP.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, locally-focused content and earning backlinks from local business associations or HVAC industry websites.

page_title: Hoodview Heating and Air Conditioning, Inc
